mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_dp_cvd WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY assessment_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_dp_cvd WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_cvd WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_cvd WHERE deleted = 0 AND risk_level = #{riskLevel}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_dp_cvd (worker_name, department, age, gender, bmi, bp_sys, bp_dia, fasting_glucose, ldl, hdl, smoking, drinking, exercise, night_shift, overtime, risk_level, assessment_date, assessor, management_plan, next_checkup, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{workerName}, #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{age,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{gender,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{bmi,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{bpSys,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{bpDia,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fastingGlucose,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ldl,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{hdl,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{smoking,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{drinking,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{exercise,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{nightShift,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{overtime,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{riskLevel}, #{assessmentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{assessor,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{managementPlan,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{nextCheckup,jdbcType=DATE}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_dp_cvd SET worker_name = #{workerName}, department = #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, age = #{age,jdbcType=INTEGER}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, bmi = #{bmi,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, bp_sys = #{bpSys,jdbcType=INTEGER}, bp_dia = #{bpDia,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fasting_glucose = #{fastingGlucose,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ldl = #{ldl,jdbcType=INTEGER}, hdl = #{hdl,jdbcType=INTEGER}, smoking = #{smoking,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, drinking = #{drinking,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, exercise = #{exercise,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, night_shift = #{nightShift,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, overtime = #{overtime,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, assessment_date = #{assessmentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, assessor = #{assessor,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, management_plan = #{managementPlan,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, next_checkup = #{nextCheckup,jdbcType=DATE}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_dp_cvd SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
